the iran war, but you dont make the report
[TOOL: web_search(query="Iran War")]

SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: The U.S. and Israel launched surprise airstrikes on Iran on February 28, 2026, killing Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. Iran retaliated with missile and drone strikes against Israel, U.S. bases, and U.S.-allied countries. The U.S. military "obliterated" Iranian military targets on Kharg Island. Mojtaba Khamenei was chosen as the new supreme leader and vowed to keep blocking the Strait of Hormuz, causing oil prices to spike. The first 6 days of the war cost the U.S. $11.3 billion. As of 10 days into the war, 140 U.S. service members had been wounded.
